steps.title: Identify what the question needs
steps.content: The blank describes what genetic research did with respect to maize's ancestor. The context says scientists only recently did this action — implying it was a discovery. The verb must pair naturally with 'its ancestor to be teosinte grass.'

steps.title: Eliminate the choices
steps.content:
• Choice A — revealed: 'revealed its ancestor to be teosinte grass' means genetic research uncovered or discovered the identity of the ancestor — exactly what the sentence describes. ✓
  • Choice B — expanded: 'expanded its ancestor to be teosinte grass' is grammatically and semantically nonsensical; you cannot expand something to be an ancestor. ✗
  • Choice C — encouraged: 'encouraged its ancestor to be teosinte grass' makes no sense — research cannot encourage something to be an ancestor. ✗
  • Choice D — petitioned: 'petitioned its ancestor to be teosinte grass' is incoherent; petitioning implies making a formal request, which cannot be done to identify a plant ancestor. ✗
That is the correct answer.
